titleStmt.title: SII 10.418: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 418. (A.R. No. 189 of 1905.) ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA.

summary.p: Śaka year is lost but may be 1189 (See A.R. No. 190 of 1905, above.)
Incomplete and damaged. Refers to an endowment for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tripurāntaka-Mahādēva. The name of the donor is lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍalēśvara Oṟayūripuravarādhīśvara kāśyapagōtra karikāla
pavitra satyahariścaṁdra vibhavāmarēṁdra mānamuṭṭugaṁḍa calamarttigaṁḍa dāḍisamarttha raṇaraṁgapārttha ripu
kuṁjarēṁjara śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjara kāryyanārāyaṇa nītipārāyaṇa paranārīdūra budha janādhāra [Āha]
vabhīma kāminījanakāma [Aśvavēdaṁḍabirudajita danābhīla] vairivīramurahara vivēkavidyā dhara gaṁbhīrasāgara kaliyuga
rādhēya śaucagāṁgēya vitaraṇavikramāditya ṭēṁkaṇāditya Anavarataparahitārttha turagadāna samarttha pratyakṣa [ dha
rmma ] naṁdana sujanaharicaṁdana Uttamagaṁḍa gaṁḍabhēruṁḍa kaliyugamogada kai sādaṁga rāyagajamadabhaṁga
pallavabhayaṁkara tribhuvanipeṁḍāru śrītripurāṁtakaśrīmahādēvaradivyaśrīpāda padmārādhaka parabalasādhaka nāmā
taṁbu lai śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
saṁvatsara mārggaśiraśuddha8 Ādivāramu
dharmmuvu gānu śrītripurāṁtaka śrīmahādēvaraku Akhaṁḍadīpā
jēkoni nityamāneṁḍu nēti lekka naḍape
Digital edition of SII 10.418 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
